title: TOYMIS Positive Lavender Crochet Potted Plants, 5.5 Inch Creative Knitted Potted Plant Cute Lavender Doll with Card Crochet Lavender Flowers Emotional Support Gift for Friend Home Office Desk Decor
features: Package Content: You will get one piece of positive lavender crochet potted plant, measuring about 14x12cm/5.5x4.7 inch, perfect size for desk, shelf, or windowsill, adding a refreshing touch without taking up too much space.

Premium Material: This knitted lavender plant toy is made of good quality wool yarn, carefully handmade and excellent crochet craftsmanship, reliable and durable, soft to touch. The intricate design and soft colors make it a unique, creative, and meaningful decoration.

Meaningful Design: The positive crochet flower is designed with lavender flower, unlike real lavender, this crochet lavender plant will never fade or wilt. Its cute and comforting appearance helps to release stress, calm the mind, and promote relaxation, making it a perfect companion during hectic days.

Symbol of Positive Energy: This lavender crochet potted plant toy is more than just a decorative item, it is a powerful message of positivity. Lavender represents calmness, hope, and love. As a toy, it serves as a reminder to stay optimistic, persevere through challenges, and embrace life with a positive attitude.

Ideal Gift Choice: This lavender plant toy makes a thoughtful gift for friends, family, coworkers, or anyone who needs encouragement on birthdays, holidays, Christmas, Thanksgiving and any other special days. The accompanying motivational card adds warmth, comfort and encouragement.
description: Product description Specification: Color: purple, green, brown Material: wool yarn Product Size: 14x12cm/5.5x4.7 inch Package details: 1 x positive lavender crochet potted plant Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between monitors, there may be a slight color difference. Safety Warning This product contains materials that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions. Keep away from young children and pets to prevent choking hazards. Do not machine wash. Always follow the care instructions provided.
